Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}"How's it going, {f 4 1}? I don't know your address so I'm sending this to the school."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase's firm handwriting fills the page...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can almost see Hayase's face.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}"I'm doing good. I'm starting to get used to the job, too."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}"But the real reason I'm writing is because of track."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}"Before, I'd pretty much given up hope of ever continuing."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}"Except there was a part of me that refused to let it go."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}"I don't care what it sounds like—track and field was my whole life!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can tell Hayase was in a good[n]mood when he wrote that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}"I guess the factory manager realized what's up, and he wants to help me out."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}"We're gonna make a track team here!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}"Well, I call it a team, but it's really just a few guys at the factory."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}"We practice after work and sometimes on our days off."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}"The other day, we did endurance swimming at Lake Biwa. We've even climbed Mt. Hiei."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}"We don't have fancy equipment like before, so we're not as efficient. But I'm still having a blast."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}"Most of the guys are just in it for fun, so I don't really get to do any serious training."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}"But I guess it'll even the playing field for them."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}"How about you? You're still at it, right?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}"I'm sure you're just gonna keep getting better and better."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}"It's weird how badly I wanna see you improve."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}"One day... you and I are gonna go at it again."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}"And if I'm gonna be a good rival, then I've got a lot of work to do."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}"It feels nice having a goal to work toward."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}"Almost forgot what it was like..."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}"Oh yeah, and my mom's getting better! She's in a long-term care facility with lots of fresh air."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}"My relatives and friends come by the house, so my siblings are in good hands, too."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}"Things have been pretty great these days."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}"I feel like I can take care of the people who matter to me. It's really fulfilling."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}"And I get to feel that way because of you."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}"Can't wait to see you again, {f 4 1}!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The letter ends there...[n]{f 1 1}
